decisions.decision: Use a lean Python CLI-first architecture.
decisions.reason: The assignment rewards data sourcing, storage design, and agent architecture more than UI complexity.

decisions.decision: Use SQLite plus JSON fixtures as the core storage approach.
decisions.reason: Leadership Q&A needs structured role/count queries, source-backed claims, and reproducible fixture loading.
This preserves former, conflicting, or lower-confidence public claims instead of overwriting provenance.

decisions.decision: Use structured retrieval before LLM answer composition.
decisions.reason: Questions such as VP counts and CTO lookup are more reliable as SQL-backed queries.

decisions.decision: Make fixture inspection runnable without secrets, but require OPENAI_API_KEY for live LLM extraction.
decisions.reason: Reviewers can inspect the dataset without API keys while the real-LLM path remains explicit.

decisions.decision: Add optional Codex and Ollama real-LLM backends.
decisions.reason: OpenAI API keys may lack quota in local review; Codex subscription auth and local Ollama allow real answer-composition smoke tests without embedding secrets.

decisions.decision: Extract explicit role sentences deterministically before LLM fallback.
decisions.reason: Live pages often contain simple high-signal phrases such as 'led by CTO Paul Nichols'; deterministic extraction prevents obvious public evidence from being missed by a probabilistic LLM response.

subagents.name: Requirements/risk audit
subagents.summary: Extracted strict requirements, hidden evaluation criteria, risks, edge cases, and README obligations from the assignment.

subagents.name: Architecture/MVP audit
subagents.summary: Recommended Python, Typer, SQLite, real LLM extraction, source provenance, fixture mode, structured query router, and optional web UI after CLI.

subagents.name: Robinhood source research
subagents.summary: Verified official Robinhood IR leadership source, Vlad Tenev bio, current VP/marketing evidence, and the May 2026 SEC 8-K indicating Jeffrey Pinner is not current CTO.

subagents.name: Campfire source research
subagents.summary: Verified meetcampfire.com redirects to campfire.ai; identified current CEO, CTO, Head of Product, VP Marketing, and historical former CTO evidence.

implementation_log.event: Created initial repository scaffold and planning documentation.
Implemented SQLite schema, fixture import/export, domain/title normalization, structured retrieval, CLI commands, live ingestion skeleton, OpenAI-backed extraction and answer composition.
Added curated Robinhood and Campfire fixtures with source-backed claims and current/former role distinctions.
Refreshed Robinhood fixture with full official leadership roster text, added deterministic structured roster extraction, coverage tests, and visible fallback warnings.
Added optional Ollama and Codex CLI LLM providers for local real-LLM answer composition without an OpenAI API key.
Hardened full Codex-backed live ingest by adding deterministic inline role extraction and normalization for empty optional fields in LLM JSON payloads.

test_runs.command: COMPANY_RAG_DB_PATH=/tmp/company-rag-smoke.sqlite uv run company-rag load-fixture data/fixtures/robinhood.com.json && COMPANY_RAG_DB_PATH=/tmp/company-rag-smoke.sqlite uv run company-rag ask robinhood.com "Where is their CEO based?" --no-llm

test_runs.status: passed: extracted 8 people and 9 claims from 7 sources after live-ingest filter hardening

test_runs.command: LLM_PROVIDER=codex CODEX_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=90 COMPANY_RAG_DB_PATH=/tmp/company-rag-codex.sqlite uv run company-rag ask meetcampfire.com "Who's their CTO?"
test_runs.status: passed: Codex subscription-backed LLM composition returned a cited Paul Nichols answer without OPENAI_API_KEY

test_runs.command: LLM_PROVIDER=codex CODEX_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=180 COMPANY_RAG_DB_PATH=/tmp/company-rag-live-codex-fixed2.sqlite COMPANY_RAG_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/company-rag-live-codex-fixed2-cache uv run company-rag ingest https://meetcampfire.com --limit 8 --output-fixture /tmp/company-rag-live-codex-fixed2-fixture.json
test_runs.status: passed: full live ingest extracted John Glasgow and Paul Nichols from live-fetched Campfire sources; LLM ask returned Paul Nichols as CTO with citation

test_runs.command: LLM_PROVIDER=ollama OPENAI_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434/v1 OPENAI_MODEL=qwen2.5:3b COMPANY_RAG_DB_PATH=/tmp/company-rag-ollama.sqlite uv run company-rag ask meetcampfire.com "Who's their CTO?"

known_limitations: Live discovery is intentionally lightweight and may need external search API support for broader company coverage.
Fixture answers can be inspected without an LLM key; LLM answer composition can use OPENAI_API_KEY, local Ollama, or a locally authenticated Codex CLI.
Campfire marketing leadership uses public third-party/profile evidence because an official Campfire leadership page was not found.
No web UI is included in v1; the submitted interface is the CLI.
